title: Section 4
content: The Chapters and sections of this Act which relate to contracts shall be taken as part of the Indian Contract Act, 1872 (9 of 1872): 1[And sections 54, paragraphs 2 and 3, 59, 107 and 123, shall be read as supplemental to the Indian Registration Act, 2[1908 (16 of 1908).]]
footnote: 1. Added by Act 3 of 1885, s. 3. 2. Subs. by Act 20 of 1929, s. 5, for "1877".
